daniel_exchange.name: Daniel Chen
daniel_exchange.body: Before you finalize: what's your read on the single biggest risk in this deal? Reply here when you have a view.

daniel_exchange.name: You
daniel_exchange.body: The single biggest risk is customer concentration — top accounts are 34% of revenue and two are already declining, which undercuts the management retention claim.

daniel_exchange.name: Daniel Chen
daniel_exchange.body: Agreed, that's the one I'd underwrite hardest. Make sure the memo says what you'd do about it, not just that it exists.

strong.final_memo:
Conditional Proceed

Value only clears if we haircut the multiple toward ~9x comps.

Top-10 concentration and declining accounts contradict the management longevity claim.

Synergy bridge appears to double-count CoC debt paydown with G&A savings.

Request the missing mid-market cohort retention file referenced as available on request; diligence the two declining top-10 renewals; confirm synergy bridge removes the overlapping CoC savings before signing.
